vocab.example: For many high-fliers, a Swiss watch is the ultimate status symbol that silently broadcasts their success.

vocab.meaning: thể hiện ta đây/làm màu (nhằm gây ấn tượng về địa vị)
vocab.example: Some people purchase luxury timepieces simply to put on airs and appear more influential than they actually are.

vocab.meaning: đang thăng tiến trong xã hội (giàu lên nhanh chóng)
vocab.example: Expensive watches are particularly popular among the upwardly mobile crowd who want their accessories to match their rising income.

vocab.meaning: những gì tốt nhất của tốt nhất/tầng lớp tinh hoa
vocab.example: Owning a Patek Philippe is seen as joining the creme de la creme of society, where horology is appreciated as fine art.
Enthusiasts are often willing to pay through the nose for a limited edition because of its rarity and historical value.

vocab.meaning: một lựa chọn an toàn/khoản đầu tư chắc chắn
vocab.example: Investing in a Rolex is considered a safe bet as these pieces rarely depreciate and often gain value over time.
Wearing a diamond-encrusted watch is a non-verbal way to blow one's own trumpet regarding their financial achievements.

vocab.word: in a league of their own
vocab.meaning: ở một đẳng cấp hoàn toàn khác biệt
vocab.example: Hand-crafted mechanical watches are in a league of their own compared to mass-produced digital alternatives.

vocab.meaning: đạt chuẩn/đủ tốt để được chấp nhận (trong giới thượng lưu)
vocab.example: In high-stakes business meetings, having a premium watch helps a professional pass muster among wealthy clients.

vocab.meaning: sang chảnh/xa hoa (thường dùng với sắc thái hơi châm biếm)
vocab.example: I don't see the need for those fancy-pants watches when a smartphone tells the time just as accurately.
